item.title: AlasdairGold: Alasdair Gold @AlasdairGold · 8min I've been looking at Spurs' final six huge games and who their relegation rivals are
item.description: Alasdair Gold @AlasdairGold · 8min I've been looking at Spurs' final six huge games and who their relegation rivals are playing on the same weekends. So many key moments ahead. De football.london 4 4 10 2 mil
